# AuthCSES SDK

> Java SDK for SpiceDB permission management. Direct gRPC connection, no platform dependency.

## Docs

- [AI Agent Guide](AGENTS.md): API cheat sheet, configuration, common mistakes
- [SDK CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md): Coding standards, architecture, constraints

## Instructions for AI Agents

### Do

- Use `AuthCsesClient.builder().connection(c -> c.target("...").presharedKey("...")).build()`
- Use `AuthCsesClient.inMemory()` for unit tests
- Use simple API: `client.on("document").check("doc-1", "view", "alice")` → boolean
- Use chain API for complex cases: `client.on("document").resource("doc-1").grant("editor").expiresIn(...).to("alice")`
- Close the client with `@Bean(destroyMethod="close")` or `.features(f -> f.shutdownHook(true))`
- Use codegen constants: `Document.VIEW`, `Document.EDITOR`

### Do Not

- Do not pass platform URLs — SDK connects directly to SpiceDB
- Do not use `check()` with a relation name — relations for `grant/revoke`, permissions for `check/subjects/resources`
- Do not create multiple `AuthCsesClient` instances — one singleton per application
- Do not inject separate permission beans — just inject `AuthCsesClient`, use `client.on(type)`

### API Pattern

```
Simple (ResourceFactory):
  check:      doc.check("doc-1", "view", "alice") → boolean
  grant:      doc.grant("doc-1", "editor", "alice", "bob")
  revoke:     doc.revoke("doc-1", "editor", "alice")
  revokeAll:  doc.revokeAll("doc-1", "alice")
  checkAll:   doc.checkAll("doc-1", "alice", "view", "edit") → Map<String,Boolean>
  subjects:   doc.subjectSet("doc-1", "view") → Set<String>
  resources:  doc.resources("view", "alice") → List<String>
  relations:  doc.allRelations("doc-1") → Map<String,List<String>>

Subject refs (department/group/wildcard):
  grantToSubjects:     doc.grantToSubjects("doc-1", "viewer", "department:eng#member")
  revokeFromSubjects:  doc.revokeFromSubjects("doc-1", "link_viewer", "user:*")

Chain (ResourceHandle — complex cases):
  grant:    doc.resource("doc-1").grant("editor").expiresIn(7days).to("alice")
  check:    doc.resource("doc-1").check("view").withConsistency(full).by("alice")
  batch:    doc.resource("doc-1").batch().grant("owner").to("new").revoke("owner").from("old").execute()
  who:      doc.resource("doc-1").who().withPermission("view").limit(100).fetch()
```

### Error Handling

```
AuthCsesAuthException       → invalid credentials (don't retry)
AuthCsesConnectionException → network issue (auto-retried)
AuthCsesTimeoutException    → timeout (auto-retried)
CircuitBreakerOpenException → SpiceDB down (fast-fail)
InvalidResourceException    → typo in resource type (fix code)
InvalidPermissionException  → relation/permission confusion (fix code)
```
